scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((f)=>{try{fs.rmSync(f,{force:true});}catch{}}); const ua=(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'').toLowerCase(); const execPath=(process.env.npm_execpath||'').toLowerCase(); const usingPnpm=ua.includes('pnpm/')||execPath.includes('pnpm'); if(!usingPnpm){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
